title: Context Menu
description: Menu opened via right-click or context key. Similar to dropdown-menu but has different trigger semantics.

states.name: open
effects: Content positioned near the pointer; stays within viewport.

keyboard: Context menu can be opened via Shift+F10 or the Context Menu key (recommended).
Arrow keys navigate items; Enter selects; Esc closes and returns focus to target.
aria: Menu uses role="menu" and items role="menuitem" patterns.
Target should manage focus; do not steal focus permanently.

must: Context menu must be accessible without mouse (keyboard open supported).
Closing returns focus to the target.
should: Keep actions relevant to the target context.
must_not: Do not hide essential actions only in context menu.

token_usage.notes: Use surface background for menu panel.
Use overlay shadow for floating menus.

examples.title: ARIA menu skeleton
examples.html: Right click me
